case_title: GINA SCHER VS. SF MUNICIPAL RAILWAY

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT SF MUNICIPAL RAILWAY
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,019.45 FILED BY SCHER, GINA AS TO DEFENDANT SF MUNICIPAL RAILWAY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-08-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-08-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-13-2020 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF GINA SCHER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SF MUNICIPAL RAILWAY IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY NICHELLE FLENTROY. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT PRIOR TO THE HEARING. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE JAN 13TH HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE OR AGREEMENT IS NOT MET; IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FILIED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
